title: pelargonium × hesilrigeae
intro: Pelargonium × hesilrigeae, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
